# Pull request

## Summary

- 

## Why

Explain the user-facing problem, maintenance issue, or bug this change addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Manual macOS smoke test, if this touches permissions, hotkeys, paste,
      model download, whisper-server, or release packaging

## Notes

Mention any limitations, follow-up issues, or screenshots/GIFs that help review.
